nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 布島扇尾鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 布島扇尾鸚鵡（Buru racket-tail，学名 Prioniturus mada），主要分布于森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Prioniturus mada is usually found in elevations up to approximately 1600 meters where it is found in many different types of forest habitat

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Like most other Indonesian birds, the Buru racket-tail is threatened by habitat destruction due to deforestation to make ways for plantations (especially palm oil), logging, and mining operations

links.label: 受威胁于
